schemes.name: PMFBY — Crop Insurance
schemes.description: Financial support to farmers for crop loss due to natural calamities
benefits: Full sum insured on crop loss

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Short-term credit up to Rs.3 lakh at subsidized rates for farmers
eligibility_criteria: Valid land records or tenancy agreement
benefits: Credit up to Rs.3 lakh at 7% interest

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM Solar
schemes.description: Solar pump and grid-connected solar power for farmers
benefits: Income from leasing land for solar plants

schemes.name: e-NAM Electronic Market
schemes.description: Online trading platform for agricultural produce — better prices for farmers
eligibility_criteria: State must have integrated e-NAM APMC

schemes.name: Micro Food Enterprises Scheme
schemes.description: Formalization and upgrading of micro food processing enterprises
eligibility_criteria: Annual turnover up to Rs.3 crore
benefits: FPO: seed capital up to Rs.4 lakh/member

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
schemes.description: Rs.5 lakh health cover per family per year — 50 crore beneficiaries
eligibility_criteria: Urban: construction, street vendor, domestic worker
No family size or age limit

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.description: Cash assistance for institutional delivery to reduce maternal mortality

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.description: Free prenatal checkups for pregnant women on 9th of every month

schemes.name: PMJAY-Sehat (J&K)
schemes.description: Extension of Ayushman Bharat to all residents of J&K including APL
benefits: Rs.5 lakh health cover per family

schemes.name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
schemes.description: Mental health services through district hospitals and community centers

schemes.name: Vidya Lakshmi Education Loan
schemes.description: Single-window platform for education loans from 38 banks
eligibility_criteria: For CSIS: family income below Rs.4.5 lakh
benefits: Loans up to Rs.10 lakh (India), Rs.20 lakh (abroad)

schemes.name: INSPIRE Scholarship
schemes.description: Rs.80,000/year for 5 years for top science students
eligibility_criteria: Pursuing natural/basic sciences at BSc/BS level
Age below 22 at time of admission

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.description: Free LPG connection to BPL women to replace traditional chulhas

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
schemes.description: High-interest savings scheme for girl child education and marriage
benefits: Section 80C deduction up to Rs.1.5 lakh

schemes.name: Mission Shakti
schemes.description: Umbrella scheme for women safety, empowerment, and welfare
benefits: Sambal: One-stop centres, helpline 181, Beti Bachao, Nari Adalat

schemes.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
schemes.description: Nutrition, health, and preschool education for children under 6

schemes.name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.description: Zero-balance bank account with RuPay card, insurance, and overdraft
eligibility_criteria: Can open at any bank/BC outlet

schemes.name: MUDRA Loan — PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.description: Collateral-free loans for small/micro business up to Rs.10 lakh
eligibility_criteria: Any Indian citizen with business plan
Not in default with any bank

schemes.name: PMEGP — Employment Generation
schemes.description: Subsidy 15-35% for new micro enterprise in manufacturing/service
eligibility_criteria: VIII pass for projects > Rs.10 lakh
benefits: Max project Rs.50L manufacturing, Rs.20L service

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.description: Ecosystem support, tax benefits, and funding for startups

schemes.name: PMAY-G — Rural Housing
schemes.description: Rs.1.2-1.3 lakh grant for pucca house construction in rural areas

schemes.name: PMAY-U — Urban Housing
schemes.description: Interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG urban families
benefits: EWS/LIG: 6.5% subsidy on Rs.6 lakh loan

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.description: Tap water connection to every rural household by 2024

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission — Individual Household Toilet
schemes.description: Rs.12,000 incentive for toilet construction in rural areas
eligibility_criteria: Must not have received earlier ODF incentive

schemes.name: MGNREGA — 100 Days Employment
schemes.description: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year for rural households
eligibility_criteria: Adult willing for unskilled manual work
benefits: Unemployment allowance if not provided in 15 days

schemes.name: PMKVY — Skill Development
schemes.description: Free skill training with certification and job placement support

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme
schemes.description: Practical training in companies with stipend for ITI graduates

schemes.name: StandUp India — SC/ST/Women Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: Bank loans Rs.10 lakh - 1 crore for SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs
eligibility_criteria: Not in default with any bank
benefits: Loans Rs.10 lakh to Rs.1 crore

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.description: Guaranteed pension Rs.1,000-5,000/month after 60 for unorganized sector
benefits: Spouse gets same pension after death
Nominee gets corpus on death of both

schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
schemes.description: Monthly pension for elderly, widows, and disabled BPL persons

schemes.name: PM DAKSH — Upskilling Marginalized Communities
schemes.description: Free skill training for SC/OBC/safai karamcharis and waste pickers

schemes.name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship Minority
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: Minority students professional courses
benefits: Rs.1000/month + course fee up to Rs.20k

schemes.name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship Disabled
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: Disabled students technical courses

schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.description: Income support Rs.6,000/year to all farmer families in 3 installments

schemes.name: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
schemes.description: Nutritional support of Rs.500/month to TB patients

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship SC/ST/OBC/Minority
schemes.description: Scholarships for students up to Class 10
benefits: Rs.100-500/month depending on class and category

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship SC/ST/OBC/Minority
schemes.description: Scholarships for students studying after Class 10

schemes.name: Central Sector Scholarship for College Students
schemes.description: Merit scholarship for top students in Class 12
eligibility_criteria: Above 80th percentile in state Class 12 board

schemes.name: PM POSHAN (Midday Meal)
schemes.description: Free hot cooked meals to school children to improve enrollment and nutrition

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
schemes.description: Girl child welfare and education promotion scheme

schemes.name: PMMVY — Maternity Benefit
schemes.description: Cash incentive of Rs.6000 for first child birth
eligibility_criteria: Pregnant/lactating women for first live birth

schemes.name: PMJJBY — Life Insurance
schemes.description: Rs.2 lakh life insurance at just Rs.436/year
benefits: Rs.2 lakh life cover on death

schemes.name: PMSBY — Accident Insurance
schemes.description: Rs.2 lakh accident insurance at just Rs.20/year
benefits: Rs.2 lakh for accidental death/full disability

schemes.name: DDU-GKY — Rural Livelihood
schemes.description: Skill training and placement for rural poor youth
eligibility_criteria: Willing to be trained and placed

schemes.name: NFSA — PDS Subsidized Ration
schemes.description: Subsidized food grains to 81 crore beneficiaries
eligibility_criteria: Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) — poorest of poor
benefits: Rice Rs.3/kg, Wheat Rs.2/kg, Coarse Rs.1/kg

schemes.name: Bhashini AI Translation
schemes.description: Real-time AI translation for 22 scheduled languages
benefits: Voice to text in Indian languages

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship SC
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: SC students post Class 10

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship ST
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: ST students post Class 10

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship OBC
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: OBC students post Class 10

schemes.name: Top Class Education SC
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: SC students top institutions

schemes.name: Ishan Uday NE Region Scholarship
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: Students from NE states

schemes.name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Girls
schemes.description: NSP scholarship: Girl students technical education

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Free soil testing and customized fertilizer recommendations for farmers

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
schemes.description: Long-term financing for post-harvest infrastructure and agri-logistics

schemes.name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
schemes.description: Free health screening and treatment for children 0-18 years
eligibility_criteria: Applicable for government school children and anganwadi children

schemes.name: Samagra Shiksha
schemes.description: Integrated scheme for school education PreK to Class 12
eligibility_criteria: Special focus on girls, SC/ST, disabled, minorities
benefits: Free uniforms (2 sets/year for girls, SC/ST)

schemes.name: Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
schemes.description: Welfare of tribal communities — education, health, livelihood

schemes.name: PM-WANI Public WiFi
schemes.description: Free/affordable public WiFi hotspots across India

schemes.name: Digital India Programme
schemes.description: Broadband, mobile, e-services for all citizens

schemes.name: National Health Mission (NHM)
schemes.description: Universal health coverage in rural and urban areas
eligibility_criteria: Priority to BPL, rural, tribal populations

schemes.name: Plan scheme on End-to-End computerization of TPDS operations - extension of the scheme by one year up to 31-03-2020.
The Completion of records of foodgrains distribution on Annavitran portal.
Schemes of the Government of Assam

Strengthening Teaching-Learning and Results for States (STARS)
Svamitva Yojana (Survey of Villages Abadi and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Area)

Atal Bhujal Yojana (Atal Jal, Atal Groundwater Scheme)
PM Kisan Urja Suraksha Evam Utthan Mahabhiyan (PM KUSUM Scheme, PM Energy Security and Upliftment Campaign)
PM Annadata Aay Sanrakshan Abhiyan (PM AASHA, Farmer Income Protection Scheme)
Ayushman Bharat Yojana (AB PM-JAY, Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana, People's Health Scheme)
PM Jan Vikas Karyakaram (PMJVK, PM People Progress Programme)
Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA, National Village Swaraj Campaign)
Khelo India - National Programme for Development of Sports
PM Matritva Vandana Yojana (PM Maternity Support Scheme)
PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PM Crop Insurance Scheme)
PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY, PM Agriculture Irrigation Scheme)
PM Mudra Yojana (PM Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency Scheme)
Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Electric (& Hybrid) Vehicles in India Scheme (FAME India Scheme)

PM Awaas Yojana - (Urban) (PMAY-R, PM Housing Scheme Urban)
PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY, PM Safety Insurance Scheme)
PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY, ( lit ) PM Life Light Insurance Scheme)
Unnat Jyoti by Affordable LEDs for All (UJALA)
PM Kaushal Vikas Yojna (PM Skill Development Scheme)
Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana (HRIDAY)
Sukanya Samridhi Yojana (Girl Child Prosperity Scheme)
PM Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Kendra (PM Indian Public Medicine Scheme, PMBJK)
Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT)
PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PM's People's Wealth Scheme)
Deendayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY, Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Rural Skills Schemes)
Rajiv Gandhi Scheme for Empowerment of Adolescent Boys (Saksham)
Sansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY, Saanjhi, Member of Parliament Model Village Scheme)
Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (National Higher Education Mission)
Scheme for Adolescent Girls (SAG, Adolescent Girls (AG) Scheme)
PM Adarsh Gram Yojana (PM Model Village Scheme)
Promotion of University Research and Scientific Excellence (PURSE)
Innovation in Science Pursuit for Inspired Research Programme (INSPIRE Programme)
Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY, National Health Insurance Programme)
National Action Plan for Climate Change (NAPCC)
Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY, National Agriculture Development Programme)
National Mission on Nano Science and Technology
Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MG-NREGA)
Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya (Kasturba Gandhi Girls School)
PM Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY, PM Health Protection Scheme)
Sampoorna Grameen Rozgar Yojana (Universal Rural Employment Scheme)
Swadhar Greh Scheme (Swadhar, Self-reliance Home Scheme)
PM Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY, PM Village Road Scheme)
Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY, Antyodaya Food Scheme)
Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (Young Scientist Incentive Plan)
Members of Parliament Local Area Development Scheme (MPLADS)
National Scheme on Welfare of Fishermen
Interlinking of Rivers Project (ILR, NPP, National Perspective Plan)
